emails.subject: PGE Dailies
emails.body: PGE Dailies I just spoke with Kim Hundl in the Confirms group. She's been told by PGE that they do not want confirmation letters sent for daily deals. Apparently there are a bunch of these in the system under your desk that are noted to be confirmed. The confirms group can change all of these deals to "no confirm," but they wanted to double-check with you guys first. Do you agree with PGE, or would you like these deals confirmed? Let me know. Thanks, Kate

emails.subject: Re: PGE Dailies
emails.body: Re: PGE Dailies I just heard the same. I was talking to Tim about the requirements being made regarding daily confirmations, and the final decision was not to confirm PGE daily deals. Question though, when we put deals into the system in Blotter, they automatically confirm. Do we have to go into every deal and switch the flag or is there a better way around it? d

emails.subject: Re: PGE Dailies
emails.body: To re-cap: I will talk to Will Smith in Houston IT about adding a function in Deal Blotter to choose confirm or no confirm. In the meantime, Houston Confirms group would greatly appreciate us changing these deals to no confirm. They will assume that all daily deals done with PGE are no confirm, but the deals will still show up on their report (and cause confirm group crankiness) if they are marked to be confirmed. Thanks for your help. Kate Diana Scholtes 03/09/2001 12:24 PM
